description_long: This cathedral features a grand, elongated nave with a steeply pitched gray roof and two prominent, symmetrical bell towers at the front, each topped with a tall spire and decorative finials. The facade is richly adorned with pointed arches, columns, and intricate tracery, giving it a distinctly Gothic appearance. Large arched windows line the sides, separated by slender vertical columns, while the main entrance is framed by a series of ornate arches and decorative motifs. The structure sits on a raised platform with broad steps leading up to the main doors. The exterior is primarily a combination of light gray stone and white detailing, with subtle tan accents at the base and around the windows. The overall impression is one of verticality, grandeur, and meticulous architectural ornamentation.
description: A grand Gothic-style cathedral with twin spired bell towers, ornate arches, and a long nave lined with arched windows. The facade is richly decorated with tracery and columns, and the structure sits on a raised platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long nave, rows of arched windows, and one of the twin bell towers with its spire.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical twin bell towers, ornate main entrance with pointed arches, and decorative facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the length of the nave and the second bell tower.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pitched roof, back wall with arched windows, and the tops of both bell towers.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The main facade is richly decorated with pointed arches, columns, and intricate tracery. There are no visible statues, but the facade features elaborate geometric and floral motifs.
attribute_entry_portal_design: The main entry portal features a large pointed arch flanked by smaller arches and columns, with decorative tracery above. The doors are grand and centrally located, but no sculptures are visible.
